ValidationRule.description: Prevents changing the status to Draft or Void when the total paid amount is not zero.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Draft'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Void') ), Total_Paid_Amount__c != 0 )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update the status because there is a payment applied to it.
